title: Crainer's FPSCore
description: A fast and lightweight optimization modpack made for PvP and SMP servers, focused on higher FPS and smoother gameplay.
body:
This modpack is designed to improve performance for **PvP and SMP gameplay**. It includes carefully selected optimization mods that increase FPS, reduce lag, and make Minecraft run smoother during fights and multiplayer sessions.

The goal of this pack is to keep the **vanilla feel** while giving players a major performance boost. Whether you're playing on competitive PvP servers or large SMP worlds, this pack helps reduce stuttering and improve stability.

## Features
* Higher FPS and better performance
* Reduced lag and stuttering
* Smooth gameplay during PvP fights
* Optimized for multiplayer and SMP servers
* Keeps the vanilla Minecraft experience

Perfect for players who want **maximum performance without changing the core gameplay**.
